top_signals.title: China gives its investors more access to bonds in Hong Kong
top_signals.summary: Authorities raise quota for offshore Connect scheme in bid to boost international use of renminbi
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Solstice CEO defends its $14.5B acquisition after the stock plunges 15%
top_signals.summary: Solstice CEO David Sewell said the company's acquisition of Element Solutions creates a "world-leading" supplier of advanced materials.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Rivian stock falls nearly 15% as company sells 75 million shares to raise capital
top_signals.summary: The capital raise occurred during extended hours trading following Rivian shares increasing 8.1% on Monday after increasing 19.2% last week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Caterpillar buys Skycatch to boost AI mine technology
top_signals.summary: The deal adds AI-powered spatial data and digital twin capabilities to Caterpillar's growing mining technology platform.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: SBI Holdings is sole investor in crypto platform EDX Markets’ $76 million Series C
top_signals.summary: Institutional crypto platform EDX Markets has closed a $76 million Series C funding round, with Japan's SBI Holdings as the sole investor.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: US Weekly Job Growth Slows for Second Week
top_signals.summary: US private employers added an average of 21,000 jobs per week in the four weeks ending June 20, 2026, according to the ADP Research Institute, a slight decline from the previous period’s 24,250 weekly gain. This marks the second consecutive week of slowing job growth, aligning with ADP’s June report showing private businesses added 98,000 ...
